name: Peanut Butter Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 Cake compressed yeast           3 1/4    To 4 cups flour
1/4 cup Lukewarm water                    1/4 c  Melted shortening
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the yeast in water.
2. Add milk, sugar, salt, shortening, eggs, nutmeg, and peanut butter to the yeast mixture. Beat well.
3. Gradually add flour until the dough is stiff enough to knead.
4. Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface until smooth.
5. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
6. Form the dough into rolls.
7. Place the rolls on an oiled baking sheet.
8. Cover and let rise again until tripled in size.
9. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 15 minutes.
10. Yield: 16 rolls.
Mrs. M.M. Farnsworth, Mitchellville, IA.
